# Nelson Freight ERP — Full Documentation
> NVOCC freight forwarding Vietnam→USA/Canada. Excel VBA ERP v14 (40-col Active Jobs) + Python FastAPI + DuckDB + Email pipeline. 709 pytest tests + 16 Rubberduck VBA tests + COM E2E. OneDrive is canonical source for live ERP files.

---

# CLAUDE.md — Project Overview

## Language
**LUÔN trả lời bằng tiếng Việt** — mọi giải thích, phân tích, hướng dẫn đều dùng tiếng Việt. Code/command vẫn viết bằng tiếng Anh như bình thường.

## Architecture
- FastAPI port 8100 (VPS) — 15 routers, DAL pattern via data_access.py
- Next.js port 3003 (VPS) — 9 pages + login, Cloudflare Tunnel HTTPS
- TelegramBot v5 — runs on VPS (NOT local)
- Parquet ~6.6M rows — ALWAYS filter last 30 days only (fallback 60d→90d nếu empty)
- DuckDB engine — 28.6x faster than Pandas

## ERP v14 Source of Truth
See `docs/erp-v14-source-of-truth.md` — AI agents and new contributors MUST read this before auditing or modifying ERP v14. Live v14 lives on OneDrive (`D:/OneDrive/NelsonData/erp/`), not in the repo. ERP/vba/ and ERP/core/refresh.py were removed (2026-04-13) — they were legacy v13 dead code.

## Key Paths
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| email_engine/data/cnee_master.xlsx | 5,316 CNEE prospects, 23 campaigns |
| email_engine/logs/email_log.csv | 585 rows — send history |
| api/routers/email_rate_router.py | Rate & Send API (Sprint 13+14) |
| webapp/src/app/dashboard/rate-send/page.tsx | Rate & Send WebApp UI |
| db/duckdb_engine.py | DuckDB query engine |
| Pricing_Engine/data/Cleaned_Master_History.parquet | Rate data ~6.6M rows |

## SMTP Config
SMTP_HOST=smtp.office365.com | SMTP_PORT=587
Files: email_engine/.env + api/.env

## Email Campaigns (cnee_master.xlsx)
| Campaign | Prospects | Notes |
|----------|-----------|-------|
| FLOORING | 1,057 | Largest |
| FURNITURE | 745 | |
| PLASTIC | 590 | |
| MALAYSIA | 562 | |
| CANDLE | 495 | Active campaign |
| + 18 more | ~867 | See memory/context/campaigns.md |

Total: 5,316 prospects | Sent: 4,198 | Not Sent: 1,118

---

# SYSTEM_STANDARDS.md — Single Source of Truth

**Last updated:** 2026-04-22 23:00

## Canonical File Paths

| Resource | Path |
|----------|------|
| Parquet rate data | `D:/OneDrive/NelsonData/pricing/Cleaned_Master_History.parquet` |
| ERP Master xlsm | `D:/OneDrive/NelsonData/erp/ERP_Master_v14.xlsm` |
| ERP VBA exports (.bas canonical) | `D:/OneDrive/NelsonData/erp/*.bas` |
| ERP refresh script | `D:/OneDrive/NelsonData/erp/refresh-v14.py` |
| ERP VBA mirror (repo backup) | `ERP/vba-v14-mirror/` |
| CNEE master data v7 (PRIMARY) | `D:/OneDrive/NelsonData/email/contact_unified_v7.xlsx` (2-sheet CNEE+SHIPPER, 62 cols, 22,854 rows) |
| Email local server | `email_engine/web_server.py` |
| Repo root (PC Home) | `D:/NELSON/2. Areas/Engine_test/` |

**RULE 1.1** — Python code reads paths via `shared/paths.py` (resolve OneDrive). No hard-coded string paths except fallback.

**RULE 1.2** — VBA code reads paths via `FindScript(relPath)` helper. No hard-code.

## Charge Name Mapping (Parquet)

**Giá báo khách all-in LUÔN ở `Charge_Name = 'Total Ocean Freight'`.**

| Rate Type | Excel column → Parquet Charge_Name |
|-----------|-------------------------------------|
| FAK | `ALL IN COST` → `Total Ocean Freight` |
| FAK | `BASIC O/F` → `BASIC O/F` (raw) |
| SCFI (HPL) | `BASE O/F` → `Total Ocean Freight` |
| FIX COC | `Base Ocean Freight` → `Total Ocean Freight` |

**RULE 2.1** — Mapping via `Pricing_Engine/charge_normalizer.py` → reads `CARRIER_RATE_MAPPING.json`. No hard-coded dict.

## Active Jobs Sheet Schema (row 7 headers)

Columns A-AN (40-col v4 layout):
```
A=MONTH  B=FAST_ID  C=Job_ID  D=CUSTOMER  E=POL-POD  F=FINAL_DEST
G=CARRIER  H=Bkg_No  I=HBL_NO  J=CONT  K=QTY  L=SERVICE  M=ETD
N=STATUS  O=TRACKING  P=SELL  Q=COST  R=PROFIT  S=EMAIL
T=Routing  U=ETA  V=ATA  W=Contract_Type  X=Profit_Margin
```

Added 2026-04-20 (milestone cols at END):
```
AO=ATD_DATE  AP=ETA_DATE  AQ=NOTIFIED_ATD  AR=NOTIFIED_ETA7
```

**RULE 3.4** — Milestone cols written by VBA "Sync Milestones" button from `milestone_state.jsonl` sidecar. Python scanner NEVER writes directly to xlsm.

**RULE 3.1** — Col Q "COST" cell comment format:
```
S/C: {Carrier} {Contract#}
Service: {Rate_Type} {Group_Rate} {Note}

Cost Breakdown (USD):
  O/F          ${basic}
  ISPS         ${isps}
  ARB          ${arb}
  PUC          ${puc}         (chỉ SOC)
  COMMISSION   ${comm}
  ─────────────
  TOTAL        ${cost}
```

## ERP Ribbon Launch Pattern (VBA → Python)

**RULE 5.1** — Ribbon callback launch MUST use WMI Win32_Process.Create. NOT Shell/wsh.Run.

```vb
' CORRECT:
Dim bootCmd As String
bootCmd = "cmd /c """"" & batPath & """ """ & arg1 & """"""
Dim wmi As Object
Set wmi = GetObject("winmgmts:\\.\root\cimv2:Win32_Process")
wmi.Create bootCmd, Null, Null, procId
ThisWorkbook.Save
ThisWorkbook.Close SaveChanges:=False
```

WHY: Excel 2013+ groups child processes in Job Object with JOB_OBJECT_LIMIT_KILL_ON_JOB_CLOSE. Shell/wsh.Run children are killed on Excel exit. WMI Win32_Process.Create creates process outside job → survives.

## Email Send Pipeline

**RULE 6.1** — Email send ONLY via `email_engine/web_server.py` (local PC) → Outlook COM desktop. No VPS API, no webapp Next.js in send chain.

**RULE 6.2** — SMTP not used. Office 365 SMTP credentials don't exist. Outlook COM local only.

## Email Anti-Spam 10 Rules

1. EXCLUDED list — active customers / opt-out emails (data/excluded_customers.json)
2. SUPPRESSED status — hard bounces, invalid emails, no MX (web_server.py:735)
3. Cooldown 14d — don't resend within 14 days
4. Hard limit 3/30d — max 3 sends per contact per 30-day rolling window
5. Typo Shield — RapidFuzz fuzzy match, threshold 85, blocks likely typos
6. Smart Send Window — Tue/Wed/Thu 9-11h recipient local time only
7. Competitor blacklist — ~52 domains, blocks CNEE/SHIPPER competitor contacts
8. Priority isolation — VIP contacts excluded from blast rotation
9. Today_sent guard — prevents duplicate sends within same day
10. Graph pacing 28/min — MIN_INTERVAL_SEC = 2.1 to respect Microsoft Graph limit

---

# TEST INFRASTRUCTURE AUDIT.md — 2026-05-03

**Baseline pytest**: 656 tests collected (1 pre-existing import error)

## Problem Summary

7 Python test files used custom runner pattern (`for test in tests: test(); sys.exit(1)`) making them invisible to pytest. 2 files were pure COM scripts with no pytest tests.

## Files Fixed

| File | Action | Result |
|------|--------|--------|
| `tests/test_v13_ribbon.py` | Wrapped module-level code in `if __name__ == "__main__"` | No longer crashes pytest; copy → `scripts/com-e2e/v13_ribbon_e2e.py` |
| `tests/test_erp_e2e.py` | Removed `if __name__ == "__main__": sys.exit(main())` | 10 pytest tests now visible; copy → `scripts/com-e2e/erp_e2e_com.py` |

## Remaining Custom Runner Files (Pending)

| File | Pattern |
|------|---------|
| `tests/test_duckdb_engine.py` | `if __name__` block with `sys.exit(1)` |
| `tests/test_anomaly_detector.py` | `for test in tests:` loop + `sys.exit(1)` |
| `tests/test_normalization.py` | `for test in tests:` loop + `sys.exit(1)` |
| `tests/test_parquet_upgrader.py` | `for test in tests:` loop + `sys.exit(1)` |
| `tests/test_rate_router.py` | `for test in tests:` loop + `sys.exit(1)` |

All 5 files converted 2026-05-03: custom runner blocks removed, 53 tests now properly collected.

---

# CONTRIBUTING.md — Test Requirements

## Python Tests

**Rule: Every new Python module in `ERP/jobs/` or `ERP/intelligence/` MUST have a corresponding test.**

| Module type | Test location | Required marker |
|------------|--------------|----------------|
| Unit test | `tests/unit/test_<feature>.py` | `@pytest.mark.unit` |
| Integration test | `tests/integration/test_<feature>.py` | `@pytest.mark.e2e` |

**pytest collection check (pre-commit):**
```bash
pytest tests/ --collect-only -q
# Must show "X tests collected" with 0 errors
```

## VBA Tests (Rubberduck)

**Rule: Every new VBA feature module `bas<Feature>.bas` MUST have a companion `TestModule_<Feature>.bas` with ≥3 test cases.**

Rubberduck: https://rubberduck-vba.com/ — free open-source VBA add-in for unit testing.

**Running VBA tests:**
1. Open `ERP_Master_v14.xlsm` in Excel
2. VBE → Rubberduck menu → Test Explorer → Run All
3. All tests pass → safe to commit VBA changes

---

# VBA RUBBERDUCK GUIDE.md — How to Write VBA Tests

## Installation

1. Download from https://rubberduck-vba.com/
2. Run installer → enable in Excel VBE (Add-ins menu)
3. If not visible: Tools → Add-ins → Browse → select Rubberduck add-in

## Writing Tests

```vba
' TestModule_MyFeature.bas
Attribute VB_Name = "TestModule_MyFeature"
Option Explicit

Private Sub Module_Setup()
    ERPv14Ribbon.SetTestMode True
End Sub

Private Sub Module_Teardown()
    ERPv14Ribbon.SetTestMode False
End Sub

Private Sub Test_fnMyFeature_HappyPath()
    Dim result As Long: result = fnMyFeature("valid_input")
    Assert.areEqual 100&, result
End Sub

Private Sub Test_fnMyFeature_EmptyInput()
    Dim result As Long: result = fnMyFeature("")
    Assert.areEqual 0&, result
End Sub
```

## Rubberduck Assertions

| Method | Usage |
|--------|-------|
| `Assert.areEqual expected, actual` | Check equality |
| `Assert.isTrue value` | Check True |
| `Assert.isFalse value` | Check False |
| `Assert.fail "message"` | Force failure |

## Running Tests

1. Single test: click inside test method → Run (F5)
2. All tests in module: right-click module → Run
3. Test Explorer: Rubberduck menu → Test Explorer → Run All

---

# ERP v14 SOURCE OF TRUTH.md

**Last updated:** 2026-04-11 | **Owner:** Nelson

## Live v14 files (OneDrive)

All under `D:/OneDrive/NelsonData/erp/`:

| File | Role | Lines | Module name |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ERP_Master_v14.xlsm` | Main workbook — 11 sheets | — | — |
| `erp-v14-quick-wins.bas` | Core helpers (cascade search, formatting, utilities) | 290 | `ERPv14Core` |
| `erp-v14-ribbon-callbacks.bas` | Ribbon state + all button handlers | 4811 | `ERPv14Ribbon` |
| `erp-v14-preset-dryreefer.bas` | Dry/Reefer column preset switcher | 120 | `ERPv14Preset` |
| `CostBreakdown.bas` | HDL rules per carrier (shared charge logic) | 276 | `CostBreakdown` |
| `CustomUI_v14.xml` | Ribbon XML — 2 tabs (Pricing + Operations) | 250 | — |
| `refresh-v14.py` | Parquet → xlsm refresh (Eff+Exp filter, 15→30→90 fallback) | 430 | — |
| `customui_utils.py` | CustomUI inject helper | 100 | — |

## v14 sheets in `ERP_Master_v14.xlsm`

| Sheet | Role | Writer |
|---|---|---|
| `Pricing Dry` | POL/POD/Carrier/20GP/40GP/40HC/45HC/40NOR buy prices | `refresh-v14.py` |
| `Pricing Reefer` | POL/POD/Carrier/20RF/40RF buy prices | `refresh-v14.py` |
| `Quotes` | Quote rows (QuoteID, customer, margin, status) | `OnAction_GenerateQuote` (VBA) |
| `Active Jobs` | Jobs promoted from WIN quotes (40-col v4 layout) | `OnAction_MarkQuoteWin` (VBA) |
| `CRM` | Customer list | Human + `ERP/crm/*.py` |
| `Markup_Store` | Per-`(carrier, lane)` margin cache | `SaveMarkupForCarrier` (VBA) |
| `PUC_Lookup` | PUC charges by Place | `refresh-v14.py` |
| `InvoiceLog` | Billing log | Human + `ERP/jobs/*.py` |
| `ChargeBreakdown` | Line-item charges per route | `refresh-v14.py` |
| `RateVersions` | FAK/SCFI/PUC version labels | `refresh-v14.py` |

---

# VBA GOTCHAS.md — Known VBA Traps

## 1. `Chr(n)` only works for 0-255 — use `ChrW(n)` for Unicode

Bug: `Mark WIN silently failed` because tracking dots used `Chr(9679)` (●).

```vba
' BAD — raises runtime error
wsJ.Cells(r, c).Value = Chr(8594) & "arrow"

' GOOD
wsJ.Cells(r, c).Value = ChrW(8594) & "arrow"
```

Unicode codes used: 8594 (→) 9675 (○) 9679 (●) 9680 (◐) 10003 (✓) 8987 (⌛) 128231 (📧)

## 2. Line continuation `& _` + next line starts with `_X` → VBA parses as `__X`

Bug: Syntax error on mailto assignment:

```vba
mailto = "http://..." & _
         _UrlEncode(x)    ' parsed as __UrlEncode — not found!
```

Fix: never put a `_`-prefixed identifier at the start of a continuation line.

## 3. `Application.Run "Module.Sub"` doesn't pass IRibbonControl

Test wrappers need to call `control As IRibbonControl` subs with a real control.
Workaround: write a `Public Sub TestXxx()` wrapper that calls the target sub with `Nothing`.

## 4. VBE "Break on All Errors" setting ignores `On Error Resume Next`

Registry: `HKCU\Software\Microsoft\VBA\<ver>\Common\DefaultErrorTrapping`
- 0 = Break on All Errors (DANGER)
- 1 = Break in Class Module
- 2 = Break on Unhandled Errors (correct default)

## 11. Declarations MUST come before first Sub/Function

Bug: `Public g_TestMode As Boolean` declared AFTER `Sub SetTestMode()` → compile OK but runtime silent failure on `SetTestMode True` call. Live Excel compiles module-level declarations first, but runtime execution order can jump past declarations. Fix: move ALL declarations (Public/Private) to the very top of the module before any Sub/Function.

---

# KNOWN LEGACY FAILURES.md

## test_erp_quote_image.py::test_quote_image_multi_route

**Status:** `@pytest.mark.skip` (2026-04-15)

Symptom: `_QuoteImg` sheet not created after `TestRunQuoteImage` — VBA returns `OK_NO_SHEET` instead of `OK:<lastRow>`.

Root cause: QuoteImage was last touched 2026-04-13 before Active Jobs v4 migration (36 → 40 cols). The Quotes sheet schema has shifted.

Re-enable when:
1. `OnAction_QuoteImage` is ported to use `ERP/core/active_jobs_cols.py` COL names
2. Quotes sheet column indices verified live
3. Happy-path manual run produces `_QuoteImg` with ≥3 route headers

Workaround: QuoteImage button still works in Excel for Nelson's daily flow.

---

# PRE-COMMIT CONFIG

```yaml
repos:
  - repo: local
    hooks:
      - id: pytest-collect-only
        name: pytest collection check
        entry: python -m pytest tests/ --collect-only -q
        language: system
        pass_filenames: false
        files: ^tests/

      - id: no-sys-exit-in-tests
        name: no sys.exit in test files
        entry: grep -r "sys.exit" tests/test_*.py
        language: system
        pass_filenames: false
        files: ^tests/test_.*\.py$
```

---

# VBA MODULE REFERENCE

## basShared.bas — Shared Constants and Test Helpers

Extracted from erp-v14-ribbon-callbacks.bas declarations section. Use for cross-module constants and test helpers.

```vba
Public Const DATA_START_ROW As Integer = 2
Public Const QUOTES_DATA_START As Long = 5
Public Const QUOTES_HEADER_ROW As Long = 4

' Active Jobs column indices
Public Const COL_POL As Integer = 1
Public Const COL_POD As Integer = 2
Public Const COL_PLACE As Integer = 3
Public Const COL_CARRIER As Integer = 4
Public Const COL_COMMODITY As Integer = 5
Public Const COL_EFF As Integer = 6
Public Const COL_EXP As Integer = 7
Public Const COL_NOTE As Integer = 8
Public Const COL_SOURCE As Integer = 9
Public Const COL_20GP As Integer = 10
Public Const COL_40GP As Integer = 11
Public Const COL_40HQ As Integer = 12
Public Const COL_45HQ As Integer = 13
Public Const COL_40NOR As Integer = 14
Public Const COL_20RF As Integer = 15
Public Const COL_40RF As Integer = 16
```

## CostBreakdown.bas — HDL Rules + Wharfage Engine

```vba
Public Type HdlRule
    hdl20       As Double
    hdl40       As Double
    comType     As String    ' "CAR COM 35" or "CAR COM 10"
    nelsonPct   As Double    ' 65 or 90
    account     As String
End Type

Public Function GetHdlRule(carrier As String, pol As String, _
                           contractType As String, cont As String) As HdlRule
```

Carriers covered: HPL, ONE, YML, MSC, CMA/CMA CGM, COSCO, EMC, HMM, MSK, OOCL, ZIM, PIL, SNL, WHL.

## TestModule_CostBreakdown.bas — 11 Rubberduck Tests

- `Test_GetHdlRule_HPL_FAK` — HPL FAK uses CAR COM 35, nelsonPct=65, hdl20=hdl40=20
- `Test_GetHdlRule_HPL_FIX_40GP` — HPL FIX 40GP hdl40=30 (higher for FIX)
- `Test_GetHdlRule_COSCO_SCF` — COSCO SCFI uses CAR COM 10, nelsonPct=90
- `Test_GetHdlRule_ONE_HPH_vs_HCM` — ONE different accounts for HPH vs HCM
- `Test_GetHdlRule_YML_FIX_HighFee` — YML FIX 20GP hdl20=300 (exceptionally high)
- `Test_GetHdlRule_UnknownCarrier` — unknown carrier returns hdl20=0 or error 5
- `Test_GetHdlRule_EmptyStrings` — empty carrier returns hdl20=0
- `Test_CalcWharfage_40GP` — wharfage positive and under $500
- `Test_CalcWharfage_SOC_Free` — SOC containers have 0 wharfage
- `Test_CalcWharfage_HCM_vs_HPH` — HCM wharfage >= HPH
- `Test_TotalCost_40GP_Full` — total cost > buy rate, < 150% of buy rate
